name: Legal Gap Report

---

**Which section or clause is affected?**
(e.g. Section 4.5, Clause 3.2.1)

**What is the gap or loophole?**
(Describe the missing protection clearly)

**Why does it matter?**
(What harm could occur without this protection?)

**Suggested fix (optional)**
(How would you close this gap?)
